name: add-validation
description: Add input/form validation with proper error UX. Covers schema validation + display + a11y.

files.hint: Form/input file: attach validation schema (Zod / Yup / Joi / class-validator / Vest — match existing convention)
Render error messages near each field (not a single global summary unless ALSO showing inline)

checklist: Identify required fields, formats (email, regex, length), and cross-field rules
Define schema using project's existing validation library (do NOT introduce new lib)
Validate on submit AND on blur (not on every keystroke — too noisy)
Show error inline next to field, with role="alert" and aria-describedby tying input to error
Use DS error color token (not literal red); use DS error icon if available
Disable submit button only when form is touched and invalid (not on initial load)
Match server-side validation rules (parity prevents 422 surprises)
Add at least 1 unit test per validation rule (happy path + 1 failure)
Test keyboard flow: Tab through fields, verify error focus management
